title: INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, Upsert, and Mutation Evidence · Result-Grain Case: Insert Values Select
summary: A ticket import and reassignment workflow must change only intended rows and retain evidence of what happened. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sql insert values select increment in a guarded ticket-mutation workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Insert validated rows from explicit values or a query while naming target columns.
Use UNION, UNION ALL, INTERSECT, and EXCEPT with compatible columns and deliberate duplicate semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
